title: Settings clarity and release history
highlights: Settings now shows useful release TLDR notes all the time, with the latest release visible first and earlier releases available in a bounded scrolling history.
Enrichment-source examples and active connection rows are much denser, so source setup and health are easier to scan without losing important status detail.
Recent concept-memory display filters more low-signal transcript residue, reducing junk concepts that should not be treated as durable knowledge.

title: Recurring concept cleanup
highlights: Automatic recurring-concept enrichment no longer promotes ambiguous single-token transcript leftovers into durable memory on its own.
Suppressed Context Library rows stay hidden from active listings while still remaining available to audit-oriented flows.
Regression coverage was added for observed junk seeds such as API, Hey, MIT, Nice, Very, and XYZ.

title: Grounded meeting-fact precision
highlights: Meeting fact extraction keeps structured accepted context line-oriented instead of flattening separate evidence lines into one blob.
Durable knowledge explanations no longer leak into customer or organization facts as if they were meeting participants.
Markdown regeneration keeps accepted context synchronized without recreating flattened duplicate context blocks.
